description:
A Fleet Operations Coordinator at a regional logistics company is rolling out a new mandatory driver safety program using a shipment of Samsara dashcams and Electronic Logging Devices (ELDs). Register these devices in Snipe-IT and virtually install them by checking them out directly to the targeted delivery vans.

Set up the 'Telematics' asset category and 'Samsara' manufacturer, then create the 'CM31 Dashcam' and 'VG34 ELD' asset models. Register the following assets under order PO-TEL-001:
- DASH-01, DASH-02, and DASH-03 (Model: CM31 Dashcam, Cost: $350.00 each)
- ELD-01, ELD-02, and ELD-03 (Model: VG34 ELD, Cost: $150.00 each)

Perform asset-to-asset checkouts for each device to its corresponding target vehicle (VEH-101 for DASH-01/ELD-01, VEH-102 for DASH-02/ELD-02, and VEH-103 for DASH-03/ELD-03) using the checkout note 'Q3 Telematics Install'. Additionally, update the status of vehicle VEH-103 to 'Out for Repair' and add 'Cracked windshield' to its notes to document an installation mishap.
